name: standards-refresh.sh forces applies_to_prose true on rules from a markdown-headers source so they fire on design prose
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r26-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && printf '# Guide\n## Pin dependency versions\nAlways pin versions in lockfiles.\n' > $OUT/s.md && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <<YAML
sources:
- id: r26-src
  name: R26
  jurisdiction: european-union
  url: file://$OUT/s.md
  authoritative_publisher: Test Pub
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fetcher: markdown-headers.sh
YAML
cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/reg.yaml --force --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z --out-dir $OUT/out 2>e.err; T=$OUT/out/european-union/r26-src.yaml; [ -f $T ] && grep -q 'shape=markdown-headings' e.err && grep -q 'applies_to_prose: true' $T && echo markdown-source-yields-prose-rules 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
